name: Steganography Extracting Files
notes:
This rule detects extraction of steganography files.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Steganography Extract Files with Steghide
SIGMA Description: Detects extraction of files with usage of steghide binary, the adversaries may use this technique to prevent the detection of hidden information.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ( LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(\.jpg).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(\.png).*?' ) AND ( LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(steghide.*?extract.*?-sf).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(unzip).*?' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Steganography Extracting Files on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches (    	     LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(\.jpg).*?' 	  OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(\.png).*?' 	)  	AND 	( 		    LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(steghide.*?extract.*?-sf).*?' 		 OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(unzip).*?' 	) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects extraction of steganography files.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
